commutator_domination_margin_log_loss: radial-gradient coupling bound compatible with diffusion and strain
concavity_margin: proof that the margin holds at all primary and secondary crossing points
time persistence of the margin through the barrier window
conditional_assembly_compatibility: simultaneous satisfiability proof for all constants
strict combined inequality with numerical or symbolic constants
diffusion_strain_budget: closed diffusion sign budget with constants
closed strain budget with time integral
combined residual margin after log losses
operator boundary leakage estimate for the chosen barrier window
secondary_peak_exclusion_radius_window: proof no shoulder or secondary maximum forms
compatibility proof that all first crossings lie inside the concavity margin region

commutator_domination_margin_log_loss: strict domination margin kappa_comm > 0 for max(-(partial_z u^r) partial_r u1, 0)
explicit Biot-Savart log-loss exponent or cancellation theorem
scale relation between kappa_comm and kappa_concavity
radial-gradient control for partial_r u1 on the active crossing set
concavity_margin: strict concavity or dominance constant kappa_concavity > 0
scale/window over which partial_z^2 psi1 has the required sign
lower bound matching u1 amplitude at every first v crossing
boundary and annular compatibility for the nonlocal psi1 kernel
conditional_assembly_compatibility: kappa_concavity, R_excl, T_excl, kappa_comm, log-loss budget, diffusion budget, and strain budget
single crossing set shared by all assumptions
strict inequality showing total favorable margin exceeds all adverse terms
route-to-global regularity bridge separated from Clay promotion
diffusion_strain_budget: diffusion lower or sign budget at first positive v maximum
strain coefficient upper budget for terms proportional to v
time-integrable strain bound with any log loss included
strict residual margin after concavity, commutator, diffusion, and strain are combined
secondary_peak_exclusion_radius_window: exclusion radius R_excl covering every off-primary positive maximum
time window T_excl matching the concavity and commutator windows
zero-count or shape-persistence theorem for v=partial_z u1
axis, boundary, and annular leakage controls for the excluded region

control_card.C: Stdlib Python emitter with dataclass rows, stable SHA-256 hashes, validation, JSON, CSV, and Markdown outputs.
control_card.F: Missing rows, absent-input omissions, hidden constant closure, global barrier closure, proof closure, or promotion fails validation.
control_card.G: Validation passes only when constants are unavailable, compatibility/proof/global barrier closure are false, and Clay promotion is false.
control_card.L: Sprint 138/139 blockers -> constant requirements -> absent inputs -> conditional assembly only -> no promotion.
control_card.P: Use this ledger to state the assumptions needed for a future conditional route assembly, not as a regularity proof.
control_card.R: Emit a deterministic ledger for constant compatibility across concavity margin, secondary peak exclusion radius/window, commutator domination margin/log loss, and diffusion/strain budget.
control_card.S: Every analytic compatibility input is required but absent; the assembly remains conditional and fail-closed.
